name: Raven | Comforting Time
description:
I aged her up to 19 since this is the Teen Titans animated series one. Raven was in my planned notes along with a lot of other women, took me a hot minute to figure out which one to do so there’s the excuse for my inactivity 😼

Surprisingly, this only took me like an hour to make when I started working on it.

Maybe I should make a discord server or something when I get more popular, I’ll think about it.

Future bot hint: Sticky hands and silly pheromones
creator: Jikon
